task:
Implement the following plan:

# Fix: AGENTS.md and TOOLS.md silent truncation (#593)

## Context

AGENTS.md and TOOLS.md are silently truncated to 6,000 characters by `WORKSPACE_FILE_MAX_CHARS` in `crates/agents/src/prompt.rs:271`. There is no log warning, no web UI indicator, and no way to configure the limit. Users with non-trivial agent instructions (the reporter has 30K chars) lose 80% of their content with zero feedback — only an LLM-visible marker `*(AGENTS.md truncated for prompt size.)*` that operators never see.

SOUL.md has no limit at all, making this inconsistent.

## Plan

### 1. Make the limit configurable via `moltis.toml` — `[chat] workspace_file_max_chars`

**`crates/config/src/schema.rs`** (~line 1495):
- Add `pub workspace_file_max_chars: usize` to `ChatConfig` with `#[serde(default = "default_workspace_file_max_chars")]`
- Add `fn default_workspace_file_max_chars() -> usize { 50_000 }`
- Update `Default` impl

**`crates/config/src/validate.rs`** (`build_schema_map`, ~line 394):
- Add `("workspace_file_max_chars", Leaf)` to the `"chat"` struct

**`crates/config/src/template.rs`** (`[chat]` section, ~line 205):
- Add commented line: `# workspace_file_max_chars = 50000  # Max chars from AGENTS.md / TOOLS.md (default: 50000)`

### 2. Thread the config value into the prompt builder

**`crates/agents/src/prompt.rs`**:
- Remove `const WORKSPACE_FILE_MAX_CHARS: usize = 6_000;`
- Add `pub workspace_file_max_chars: Option<usize>` to `PromptRuntimeContext` (defaults to `None`)
- In `build_system_prompt_full`, read `runtime_context.workspace_file_max_chars.unwrap_or(50_000)` and pass it to `append_workspace_files_section`
- Update `append_workspace_files_section` signature to accept `max_chars: usize`

**`crates/chat/src/lib.rs`**:
- In `build_prompt_runtime_context`, read `moltis_config::discover_and_load().chat.workspace_file_max_chars` and set it on the returned `PromptRuntimeContext`

### 3. Add `warn!()` logging on truncation

**`crates/agents/src/prom
